title: Device Settings - Settings screen for connected device
scenario: Device Settings screen displays appropriate tabs (Onboarding, User Guides, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset Device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones) based on connected headset
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the phone.
3. On the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Observe the list of tabs displayed on the Device Settings screen.

5. Verify that the tabs shown are appropriate for the connected device. Expected tabs may include: Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset Device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones.
6. Note that the exact set of tabs may vary depending on the specific Poly headset model connected.
expected: The Device Settings screen displays the appropriate set of tabs for the connected Poly headset. Tabs may include: Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset Device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones. The tab list varies by device model.
